title: ConfigCoverageAudit -- add ConvoVault, PipelineSteering, IntegrityCore, FullSystemsScan to pattern list
description: Invoke-ConfigCoverageAudit.ps1 checks whether key features/modules are represented in config/. With the addition of PwShGUI-ConvoVault.psm1, PwShGUI-IntegrityCore.psm1, PipelineSteering agent, and Invoke-FullSystemsScan.ps1, the audit's feature coverage list may not include these. Update ConfigCoverageAudit to verify: (1) agents/convo-vault-key vault entry exists, (2) config/cron-aiathon-schedule.json has TASK-FullSystemsScan and TASK-ConvoVaultExchange, (3) agentic-manifest includes PwShGUI-ConvoVault and PwShGUI-IntegrityCore exports.
notes: Run Invoke-ConfigCoverageAudit after update to confirm coverage %. Target: 100% of active modules represented in config coverage check.
